City Bookshop - Quick Start
===========================

1) Keep all files and folders together in this dist folder.
2) Double-click run.bat to start the application (no background CMD window).
3) If run.bat does not start, open Command Prompt in this folder and run:
   java -jar City_Bookshop.jar

Requirements
------------
- Java 17 or later must be installed.

Notes
-----
- Do not remove the lib folder.
- run.bat launches the app using javaw.
- The app stores data in text files and needs write permission in this folder.
